Title: SmoothFloor Curve
Description: This curve puts a floor on the output of the child curve asset. As the curve approaches the floor within the provided range, it gets smoothed.

Options.Label: Floor
Options.Description: The minimum value this curve will output.

Options.Label: Range
Options.Description: The range determines how much smoothing is applied. A good starting value would be ¼ of the known range of your child curve.
